2603.28583.title: Navigating the Mirage: A Dual-Path Agentic Framework for Robust Misleading Chart Question Answering
2603.28583.paper_summary: Despite the success of Vision-Language Models (VLMs), misleading charts remain a significant challenge due to their deceptive visual structures and distorted data representations. We present ChartCynics, an agentic dual-path framework designed to unmask visual deception via a "skeptical" reasoning paradigm. Unlike holistic models, ChartCynics decouples perception from verification: a Diagnostic Vision Path captures structural anomalies (e.g., inverted axes) through strategic ROI cropping, while an OCR-Driven Data Path ensures numerical grounding. To resolve cross-modal conflicts, we introduce an Agentic Summarizer optimized via a two-stage protocol: Oracle-Informed SFT for reasoning distillation and Deception-Aware GRPO for adversarial alignment. This pipeline effectively penalizes visual traps and enforces logical consistency. Evaluations on two benchmarks show that ChartCynics achieves 74.43% and 64.55% accuracy, providing an absolute performance boost of ~29% over the Qwen3-VL-8B backbone, outperforming state-of-the-art proprietary models. Our results demonstrate that specialized agentic workflows can grant smaller open-source models superior robustness, establishing a new foundation for trustworthy chart interpretation.
2603.28583.paper_summary_zh: 儘管視覺-語言模型（VLMs）取得了成功，誤導性圖表仍然是一個重大挑戰，因為它們具有欺騙性的視覺結構和扭曲的數據表示。我們提出了ChartCynics，一個代理雙路徑框架，旨在通過“懷疑”的推理範式揭示視覺欺騙。與整體模型不同，ChartCynics將感知與驗證解耦：診斷視覺路徑通過戰略性的ROI裁剪捕捉結構異常（例如，反轉的坐標軸），而OCR驅動的數據路徑確保數字基礎。為了解決跨模態衝突，我們引入了一個代理摘要器，通過兩階段協議進行優化：Oracle-Informed SFT用於推理蒸餾，Deception-Aware GRPO用於對抗性對齊。這個流程有效地懲罰視覺陷阱並強制邏輯一致性。在兩個基準上的評估顯示，ChartCynics達到了74.43%和64.55%的準確率，提供了約29%的絕對性能提升，相較於Qwen3-VL-8B骨幹，超越了最先進的專有模型。我們的結果表明，專門的代理工作流程可以使較小的開源模型獲得更強的穩健性，為可信的圖表解釋建立了一個新的基礎。
2603.28583.author: Yanjie Zhang et.al.
2603.28583.authors: Yanjie Zhang, Yafei Li, Rui Sheng, Zixin Chen, Yanna Lin, Huamin Qu, Lei Chen, Yushi Sun
